initiatives.name: Latino Rifle Association
initiatives.description: A progressive mutual aid organization dedicated to connecting Latino gun owners and providing firearms education from a Latino cultural perspective. They coordinate community education, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while advocating for the empowerment and self-defense rights of marginalized communities.

initiatives.name: Yellow Peril Tactical
initiatives.description: E/SE Asians doing firearm education, celebrating our history, & uplifting struggles across Asia & the diaspora
